stem: A circle has center O, and points U and V lie on the circle. In triangle OUV, the measure of ∠UOV is 70°. What is the measure of ∠OUV, in degrees? (Disregard the degree symbol when entering your answer.)
rationale: The correct answer is 55. Since OU and OV are radii, triangle OUV is isosceles, so ∠OUV = ∠OVU. The angles sum to 180°, so 70 + 2(∠OUV) = 180, giving ∠OUV = 55°.
